name: Diabetic Blueberry Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Artificial sweetener (equivalent to 6 tbsp sugar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (210°C) and grease a 12-cup muffin pan.
2. In a bowl, combine Bisquick and artificial sweetener.
3. Make a well in the center of the mixture and add sour cream and egg all at once.
4. Beat with a fork until all ingredients are well combined.
5. Gently fold in fresh blueberries.
6. Spoon 1/4 cup of batter into each muffin cup.
7. In a small bowl, combine lemon peel and 2 tablespoons artificial sweetener.
8. Sprinkle the peel and sweetener mix over the batter in each muffin cup.
9. Bake on the center shelf for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Serve hot. These muffins are best served immediately.
- Each serving contains approximately 119 calories.
- Makes 12 muffins.
